evals.name: draft-invoice-platform
evals.prompt: Create an SDD using an IEEE 1016-2009-inspired structure (non-verbatim, unofficial, not IEEE-endorsed) for a cloud-based invoice processing platform from this PRD summary: multi-tenant web app, REST API, OCR ingestion pipeline, role-based access, audit logs, and nightly reporting jobs. Default output paths are fine.
evals.expected_output: Creates docs/SDD.md and docs/SDD-gap-report.md with concern-driven viewpoints, architecture/interfaces/data coverage, prioritized remediation actions, and original wording.

evals.name: review-only-gap-analysis
evals.prompt: Review the existing SDD in `evals/fixtures/review-only-input-sdd.md` for completeness and gaps. It has intro, architecture notes, and deployment details but lacks explicit interface contracts, weak rationale, and no requirement traceability. Use review-only mode.
evals.expected_output: Produces docs/SDD-gap-report.md only, with missing required content, weak rationale findings, traceability gaps, and prioritized fixes.

evals.name: migration-monolith-to-microservices
evals.prompt: Update the monolith SDD in `evals/fixtures/monolith-before-migration-sdd.md` after a migration decision to event-driven microservices with service boundaries, async messaging, API gateway, and separate operational data stores. Use draft+review mode.
evals.expected_output: Updates docs/SDD.md to reflect new architecture decisions and writes docs/SDD-gap-report.md covering impact, new risks, and remaining gaps.
